title: v1.3: ensemble-domain axes (N_SEEDS, N_TEMPERATURES, N_NOISES, N_REPLICAS)
description: Phase 2 (commit 704037f) added the FITTING-domain axes (N_ATOMS, N_BONDS, N_ANGLES, N_TORSIONS, N_CONFORMERS, N_MOLS) — sufficient for §7.1 paper-grade bonded fitting. tev_design has additional ensemble-domain axes for inference (N_SAMPLES, N_TEMPERATURES, N_NOISES, N_JACOBIAN_PAIRS, N_COMBINE, N_APC_PAIRS). Prolix MD analogs needed when ensemble methods land: N_SEEDS (replicate sweeps), N_TEMPERATURES (replica exchange / parallel tempering), N_NOISES (Langevin friction sensitivity), N_REPLICAS (replica-exchange independent of seeds). Wire as AxisSpec instances in src/prolix/tiling/axes.py with appropriate cardinalities and heterogeneous flags. Pair with BatchPlan dispatch coverage in FittingPlan (already wired via task #48; just need to extend dispatch to these new axes for any ensemble-aware FittingPlan variant). Cheap incremental work when v1.3 ensemble methods land. Not blocking §7.1.

title: praxia insert_backlog / insert_staging DB failure
description: praxia sync --journal backlog and staging add fail with insert_* in backlog.rs/staging.rs. XR and XA items live only in .praxia/backlog.jsonl; daemon/MCP queue blind. Blocks epic-audit DB registration.

title: bathos outcome=unknown despite gate_pass=1 JSON
description: Titanix xr_parity_omm_tip3p runs cbea8064 and dfa001bf complete EXIT=0 with T2-passing JSON but catalog outcome stays unknown (empty outcome_error_reason). Blocks AC2 SQL-only pass detection.
